narrative:
Cols 58-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,183 registered voters, with 66.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
